blended.narrative: Spirit Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,922 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
